headline: SOUR PATCH KIDS® BESTIES: A Candy Meant to Be Shared
summary: SOUR PATCH KIDS is bringing friends together with the launch of SOUR PATCH KIDS BESTIES, a playful new candy format where four SOUR PATCH KIDS candies are linked "hand-in-hand" to form one connected candy chain. Combining the brand's signature SOUR THEN SWEET taste with a fun, interactive experience, SOUR PATCH KIDS BESTIES create a social eating adventure.
